title: PCR Preparation
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs a custom PCR preparation on DNA samples in triplicate using pre-created mastermix. ---
steps_raw: This protocol performs a custom PCR preparation on DNA samples in triplicate using pre-created mastermix. ---
Enter number of DNA samples and Oligo standards (cannot exceed 30 samples)
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
